post.summary: Ingest text or a file into Knowledge Graph
post.description:
Accepts ingestion payload quickly and processes it asynchronously in the background.

Request body can be sent as either:
- `application/json` (plain text): `content`, optional `filename`, optional `source_name`
- `multipart/form-data` (plain text and/or file): optional `content`, optional `filename`, optional `source_name`, optional `file`

At least one of `content` or `file` must be provided.

If no source is specified, a default 'api_ingest' source is created (or reused). Provide `source_name` to create/use a separate source.

parameters.name: graph_id_or_name

schema.title: Knowledge Graph ID or System Name
schema.description: The UUID or System Name of the Knowledge Graph to ingest content into.

parameters.description: The UUID or System Name of the Knowledge Graph to ingest content into.

parameters.name: json_data

schema.title: Ingest payload (application/json)
schema.description: Use `application/json` for plain text only ingestion. For file upload (and/or mixed text+file), use the multipart/form-data variant.

parameters.description: Use `application/json` for plain text only ingestion. For file upload (and/or mixed text+file), use the multipart/form-data variant.

parameters.name: form_data

schema.title: Ingest payload (multipart/form-data)
schema.description: Use `multipart/form-data` to upload a file and/or provide plain text. Form fields: `source_name`, `content`, `filename`, `file`.

parameters.description: Use `multipart/form-data` to upload a file and/or provide plain text. Form fields: `source_name`, `content`, `filename`, `file`.

400.description: Bad request syntax or unsupported method

definition.description: Job definition including configuration and parameters

conversation_id.description: Conversation id associated with this agent run

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace id associated with this agent run.

message.description: User message to send to the agent.

client_id.description: Optional client-side identifier (e.g., user_id + page_name) to retrieve or create a conversation without storing conversation_id on the client side. If both conversation_id and client_id are provided, conversation_id takes precedence.

filter_documents_by_metadata.description: Optional metadata filter expression to constrain documents. May be provided as a JSON object or as a stringified JSON value.

name.description: Display name of the knowledge graph

system_name.description: Optional system name; derived from name if omitted

filter_documents_by_metadata.description: Optional metadata filter expression to constrain documents. May be provided as a JSON object or as a stringified JSON value.

prompt_template_system_name.description: Prompt template system name to execute

segment_size.description: Segment size in characters (used when approach=document)

max_extraction_iterations.description: Total extraction passes per segment (1 = single pass, 3 = initial + 2 verification passes)

filter.description: Filter expression applied on top of the entity type. Supports field predicates ({"field": "name", "op": "eq", "value": "..."}), boolean groups (and/or/not), and operators: eq, ne, in, contains, not_contains, like, exists, not_exists, gt, gte, lt, lte. Unknown field names are resolved against column_values keys.

is_multiple.description: Whether the field can have multiple values

allowed_values.description: Optional list of allowed values (objects with at least `value`)

llm_extraction_hint.description: LLM instruction/hint for extracting this field

is_required.description: Whether this field must always be present in extraction output

content.description: Plain text to ingest into the Knowledge Graph. This field is required for `application/json` requests.
examples: Here is the content I want to ingest...

filename.description: Optional logical filename for the plain text payload. If omitted, a generated ingestion ID is used.

source_name.description: Optional name of the API ingest source to create/reuse under this graph. Defaults to `API Ingest` if omitted or blank.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata to attach to the ingested document. Stored under the `source` key in the document metadata.

source_name.description: Optional name of the API ingest source to create/reuse under this graph. Defaults to `API Ingest` if omitted or blank.

content.description: Plain text to ingest. You can provide `content`, `file`, or both. If both are provided, both will be ingested.
examples: Here is the content I want to ingest...

filename.description: Optional logical filename for the `content` payload. If omitted, a generated ingestion ID is used.

metadata.description: Optional JSON-encoded key-value metadata to attach to the ingested document. Must be a valid JSON object string. Stored under the `source` key in the document metadata.

file.description: File to ingest into the Knowledge Graph. This field is only applicable for multipart/form-data requests.

prompt_template_system_name.description: Prompt template system name to execute

segment_size.description: Segment size in characters (used when approach=document)

skipped_documents.description: Documents skipped due to missing content

skipped_chunks.description: Chunks skipped due to missing content

query.description: User question or query for retrieval

tool_inputs.description: External tool inputs provided by the API caller.

conversation_id.description: Conversation id associated with this preview run

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace id associated with this retrieval run.

filter_documents_by_metadata.description: Optional metadata filter expression to constrain documents. May be provided as a JSON object or as a stringified JSON value.

interval.description: Schedule interval label (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly)

timezone.description: Timezone for cron evaluation (defaults to UTC)

config.description: Partial config to merge into existing config

settings.description: Graph settings object to fully replace

url.description: Direct http(s) URL to a file

PromptObservabilityLevel.title: PromptObservabilityLevel
PromptObservabilityLevel.description:
Defines the level of observability logging for a prompt variant.

    - NONE: No logging at all - the span and metrics are completely skipped
    - METADATA_ONLY: Logs metadata (tokens, cost, latency, model info) but excludes input/output content
    - FULL: Full logging including input and output content (default behavior)

config.description: Config with steps, expected_input, and optional api_tool_call per step: { steps: [{ prompts, api_tool_call?: { enabled, api_server, api_tool, body, output_key } }], expected_input?: string[] }

observability_level.description: Level of observability logging: 'none' (no logging), 'metadata-only' (tokens/cost/latency only), 'full' (includes input/output)

source.description: Source: 'api' (from provider API) or 'litellm' (from LiteLLM registry)

error.description: Error message if fetching from API failed
